intention: 让房间看起来更好或更舒服
sentencePatterns: The placement of ... makes the room look better.
realLifeExamples: The placement of the picture on the wall makes the room look better.
The placement of the chairs makes the room look bigger.
usageNotes: 这里常用 make + object + base verb，后面接 look + adjective。
productionPrompts: 用 The placement of ... makes the room look ... 造一句和家具或装修有关的句子。
